$comment: Single source of truth for which Kovo packages are PUBLIC (safe for outside consumers to depend on) vs PRIVATE (repo-internal, no external consumer should import them). Consumed by site/scripts/api-ref.mjs and the api-surface CI gate (scripts/api-surface-gate). See rules/api-surface.md and plans/api-cleanup.md. `kind`: library = importable package; build-tool = consumed by an app's build/codegen step; cli = run as a bin; starter = shadcn-style copy-in (not a versioned dep). `apiRef` (order/slug/description) marks packages whose public surface is rendered into the generated API reference.

apiRef.description: Component model, diagnostics registry, routes, queries, forms, storage, and webhook verifiers.
Schemas and validation, guards and sessions, the request lifecycle, route matching, rendering, and streaming.
Client runtime: the Kovo loader, delegated events, island signals, morphing, the query store, and optimistic mutations.
Test harness: PGlite-backed databases, db verification against the touch graph, and mutation/property testing.
Drizzle adapter: table annotations, touch-graph extraction from queries, and invalidation registry derivation.
StyleX-inspired typed styling: atomic style objects, attrs/props merging, CSS variables, and theme classes.
Better Auth adapter: typed session/sign-in/up/out mutations, authed/role guards, and the redirect-protocol mount.
Build/codegen surface: app-graph derivation, component compilation, fixpoint/render-equivalence assertions, and the Vite plugin.
Programmatic verifiers behind the kovo CLI: kovoCheck and kovoExplain over the compiler's app graph.
